action_set_definitions.name: list_resources
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves a list of all provisioned resources in the environment to identify resource IDs and names.

resource_type.description: Optional filter for specific resource types (e.g., 'database', 'policy-manager').

action_set_definitions.name: get_resource_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full configuration and current tags for a specific resource using its unique ID.

resource_id.description: The unique identifier of the resource.

action_set_definitions.name: update_resource_tag
action_set_definitions.description: Updates or adds a specific tag value to an existing resource.

resource_id.description: The ID of the resource to update.

tag_value.description: The new value for the tag (e.g., 'Verified').

action_set_definitions.name: get_regional_quota
action_set_definitions.description: Checks current resource usage and limits for the active region.

resource_category.description: The category of quota to check (e.g., 'instances').

action_set_definitions.name: provision_database
action_set_definitions.description: Deploys a new database instance with specific compliance settings.

subnet_name.description: The name of the subnet where the database will be provisioned.

encryption_enabled.description: Must be set to true for organization compliance.

action_set_definitions.name: decommission_resource
action_set_definitions.description: Permanently removes a resource from the cloud environment.

resource_id.description: The ID of the resource to decommission.

state_description.resources: A list of all provisioned cloud resources including their current configuration and lifecycle status.
state_description.quotas: The current usage and limits for different resource types (e.g., max_instances, max_vpcs).
state_description.region_config: The active cloud region where resources are being provisioned.
state_description.network_topology: Mapping of networking dependencies such as VPC-to-Subnet relationships and Routing Tables.
state_description.global_resource_counter: An internal counter used to generate unique Resource IDs (e.g., i-001, vpc-002).
